source.note: Same rock/fluid/well configuration as the heavy deck; only DIMENS, cell-count multipliers, producer location and TSTEP differ, mirroring configureCommonTwoPhase plus waterWellConfig in scripts/fim-wasm-diagnostic.mjs.

flow.gravityNote: Gravity MUST be disabled. The ResSim presets run gravity-off (configureCommonTwoPhase); leaving Flow's default on makes it converge in far fewer iterations and invalidates every comparison. See worklog WATER-019.
